hero.badge: Senior Application Development Engineer — Ref… · Contract
hero.description: Senior application development engineer with fifteen years gathering requirements, documenting functional specifications, and coordinating user acceptance testing in regulated enterprise environments. I validate scope with stakeholders, translate ambiguous needs into developer ready requirements, and track status through Agile delivery cycles with audit ready documentation. Available immediately for remote contract work from northern Illinois.

highlights.label: Requirements gathering, requirements validation, functional specifications, business process modeling, user acceptance testing, UAT coordination, user stories, product backlogs, stakeholder communication, technical documentation, user training support, defect tracking, Agile delivery, SQL, Power BI, Tableau, Jira, Confluence, regulated enterprise systems, remote contract delivery

experience.title: Delivery Record
experience.intro: Contract consulting work. Client names withheld under standard NDAs.

items.title: Senior Application Requirements and Validation Specialist
bullets: Gathered and validated business and technology requirements for reporting platforms and analytics applications, defining scope, acceptance criteria, and release metrics with internal sponsors.
Translated stakeholder requests into functional specifications and testable requirements for development and QA partners.
Planned and coordinated user acceptance testing with scripted scenarios, defect logging, retest cycles, and sign off documentation before production release.

items.title: Application Integration and Reporting Analyst
bullets: Documented reporting workflows, KPI definitions, and data dependencies for stakeholders adopting new dashboard packages.
Interpreted business questions into feasible reporting options and supported acceptance testing handoffs for recurring operational reporting.

items.title: Contract Systems Validation and Documentation Analyst
bullets: Executed user acceptance style test cycles with defect tracking, reconciliation procedures, and sign off summaries in regulated environments.
